summary: Iteration 7 - Major learning flow overhaul tested: Written answer evaluation (replaces multiple choice), auto-timer, spelling controls. Backend: 18/18 tests passed. Frontend: All key UI features verified.

minor.issue: spellcheck_disabled and spelling_mode fields return null in student response even after being updated via toggle endpoints. The toggle endpoints work correctly (verified) but the fields are not included in the Student model schema.
minor.notes: The toggle endpoints correctly update MongoDB and return the new value, but GET student doesn't show these fields in the response serialization.

action_items: Consider adding spellcheck_disabled and spelling_mode fields to Student model in models.py so GET /api/students/{id} returns these values
critical_code_review_comments: WrittenAnswerModal correctly uses textarea instead of multiple choice radio buttons
Auto-timer in NarrativeReader correctly starts on mount and has no start/stop controls
evaluate-written endpoint has lenient fallback if AI fails (passes if 5+ words)
Admin Settings tab correctly shows global spellcheck toggle and free account limits
Guardian student cards show spellcheck and spelling mode toggle buttons with correct data-testid attributes

test_credentials.student_sj: code=STU-DR40V7, pin=914027 (has stories for testing reader)

context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 7 verified the major learning flow overhaul: 1) Written answer evaluation replaces multiple choice comprehension checks - WrittenAnswerModal.jsx has textarea, apiClient.post('/assessments/evaluate-written') works. 2) Auto-timer in NarrativeReader.jsx starts on mount, no start/stop buttons. 3) Spelling controls: guardian student cards have spellcheck toggle and spelling mode buttons; Admin Settings tab has global spellcheck, spelling mode, and free account limits. 4) Minor issue: Student model doesn't include spellcheck_disabled/spelling_mode in schema so GET endpoint doesn't return these fields, but toggle APIs work correctly.

frontend_ui_tests: Guardian portal loads with STUDENTS tab
Student card shows SPELLCHECK ON button
Student card shows PHONETIC OK button
Admin dashboard has APP SETTINGS tab
App Settings shows global spellcheck toggle
App Settings shows free account limit inputs
App Settings has SAVE SETTINGS button
FINISH CHAPTER & ANSWER QUESTION button visible
WrittenAnswerModal opens with textarea (not multiple choice)

components_verified: Timer shows elapsed time and WPM
